_comment: Maps scope name → list of repo-relative path patterns. Patterns ending with / are directory prefixes; others are fnmatch globs (where * also crosses /). Used by docs/agent-notes/README.md (humans) and .claude/hooks/scope-notes-reminder.py (machine). KEEP PATTERNS DISJOINT — the hook adds every matching scope, so overlapping globs produce double reminders. When adding a scope, add it here AND list it in README.md's index. cloudflare/ and aws/ are pre-wired for when those root modules land; until the dirs exist the hook simply never fires for them.
